generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors and type mismatches.
Prioritize repairs that use visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
When fixing type errors, ensure helper declarations match expression types (int, real, bool).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Range checks often use the pattern: `eq range_ok : bool = x >= lower and x <= upper;`
anti_patterns: Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Do not introduce unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Do not use implementation-level details in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
